entries.title: Manage catalog translations directly
entries.description: Edit translations for products, ranges, and variants field by field, with manual overrides when automated wording needs adjustment.

entries.title: Review translations that need attention
entries.description: See accurate review counts and work through a dedicated queue with clear links to each affected item.

entries.title: Open the right edit tab directly
entries.description: Catalog edit tabs now have shareable URLs and switch reliably without losing pending changes.

entries.title: Keep long audit changes readable
entries.description: Long values now stay contained within the audit history instead of disrupting the page layout.

entries.title: Open related records from assistant replies
entries.description: Assistant responses now link related items so you can jump directly to the referenced records.

entries.title: Switch languages in one click
entries.description: Use the compact language toggle to move between English and Afrikaans while keeping desktop navigation and page layouts tidy.

entries.title: Stay oriented on product pages
entries.description: The Home navigation item no longer appears active while you are viewing a product page.
